---
title: "1.9 Method Signatures"
subtitle: "Part 4: Song with Parameters Challenge"
format:
  clean-revealjs:
    slide-number: true
    css: unit1-shared.css
lang: zh-CN
---

## Course Directory

### Return to the course outline

[← Back to AP CSA / 返回课程目录](../../index.html)

## Topic Intro

### Groupwork coding challenge

Here is another song, "The Ants Go Marching", that is very similar in its repetitive structure.

The verses have repeated words and phrases.

The words or phrases that are different in each verse will be the arguments that you pass to the methods in your song code.

## Find the Different Phrases

### `clickablearea:: clickDifferentAntSong`

Look for words that are different in verse `1`, `2`, and `3`.

```text
The ants go marching one by one, hurrah, hurrah
The ants go marching one by one, hurrah, hurrah
The ants go marching one by one
The little one stops to suck a thumb
And they all go marching down to the ground
To get out of the rain, BOOM! BOOM! BOOM! BOOM!
```

## Find the Different Phrases

### Verse 2

```text
The ants go marching two by two, hurrah, hurrah
The ants go marching two by two, hurrah, hurrah
The ants go marching two by two
The little one stops to tie a shoe
And they all go marching down to the ground
To get out of the rain, BOOM! BOOM! BOOM! BOOM!
```

## Find the Different Phrases

### Verse 3

```text
The ants go marching three by three, hurrah, hurrah
The ants go marching three by three, hurrah, hurrah
The ants go marching three by three
The little one stops to climb a tree
And they all go marching down to the ground
To get out of the rain, BOOM! BOOM! BOOM! BOOM!
```

## Different Phrases Answer

### Arguments for the methods

The changing phrases are:

::: {.tight-list}
- `one`, `suck a thumb`
- `two`, `tie a shoe`
- `three`, `climb a tree`
:::

These are the arguments for `chorus(String num)` and `verse(String num, String action)`.

## Code Task

### `activecode:: challenge-1-9-song`

Write code in the `main` method that calls the `verse` method to print out all three verses for the Ants Go Marching song above.

Use the correct arguments for each verse.

## Starter Code

### `challenge-1-9-song`

::: {.code-scroll}
```java
public class AntsSong
{
    public static void chorus(String num)
    {
        System.out.println("The ants go marching " + num
                         + " by " + num + " hurrah, hurrah");
        System.out.println("The ants go marching " + num
                         + " by " + num + " hurrah, hurrah");
    }

    public static void verse(String num, String action)
    {
        System.out.println("The ants go marching " + num + " by " + num);
        System.out.println("The little one stops to " + action);
        System.out.println("And they all go marching down to the ground");
        System.out.println("To get out of the rain, BOOM! BOOM! BOOM! BOOM!\n");
    }

    public static void main(String args[])
    {
        // Call the chorus and verse methods
        // with the correct arguments
        // to print out all three verses above.
        // Write your code here

    }
}
```
:::

## Test Requirements

### Call-count checks

Runestone checks:

::: {.tight-list}
- code contains `3` calls to `chorus`
- code contains `3` calls to `verse`
:::

The intended calls use the phrases identified in the previous slides.

## Expected Output

### `testMain`

::: {.code-scroll .compact}
```text
The ants go marching one by one, hurrah, hurrah
The ants go marching one by one, hurrah, hurrah
The ants go marching one by one
The little one stops to suck a thumb
And they all go marching down to the ground
To get out of the rain, BOOM! BOOM! BOOM! BOOM!

The ants go marching two by two, hurrah, hurrah
The ants go marching two by two, hurrah, hurrah
The ants go marching two by two
The little one stops to tie a shoe
And they all go marching down to the ground
To get out of the rain, BOOM! BOOM! BOOM! BOOM!

The ants go marching three by three, hurrah, hurrah
The ants go marching three by three, hurrah, hurrah
The ants go marching three by three
The little one stops to climb a tree
And they all go marching down to the ground
To get out of the rain, BOOM! BOOM! BOOM! BOOM!
```
:::

## Classroom Check

### A complete answer should include

::: {.tight-list}
- identify the changing `num` arguments: `one`, `two`, `three`
- identify the changing `action` arguments: `suck a thumb`, `tie a shoe`, `climb a tree`
- call `chorus` three times
- call `verse` three times
- pass arguments in the method-signature order
- match the expected output exactly
:::

## End

### 1.9 complete

The next topic begins calling class methods.
